reviews.review_title: NOT AT ALL WHAT'S IN THE SCREENSHOT
reviews.review_description: Terrible design. Settings don't work. Music is a 30 second loop that despite turning off didn't start off. Poor graphics and gameplay, bad mechanics.. Bait and switch advertising. AVOID. POORLY MADE cartoonish cell shaded bad graphics and sound, bad physics, bad game all around. ABSOLUTELY REGRET

developer_response.body: Hi there, we’re sorry to hear that your experience didn’t match your expectations. We truly value your feedback and are already working on improvements to graphics, sound settings, and overall gameplay mechanics. The screenshots reflect ongoing updates, and we’ll make sure future versions better showcase the actual in-game visuals. Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts — your input helps us make the game better for everyone.

reviews.review_description: Low price worth checking out. It starts to feel a bit repetitive. Adding more cars, tracks, and a better sense of progression would make it much more enjoyable.
